text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho—the final crown of the Classics,
held in Kyoto on a 3,000-meter track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The showdown between Ryan and McQueen will
unfold here at this grand event.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I've always lost against McQueen in
everything... Always.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
In elegance, cuteness, spirit... I could never come
close to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not mad that I lost! Being so weak in
comparison made me respect her! It made me
wanna catch up to her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And it really made me want to win against
someone who I couldn't beat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My lackluster performance has kind of been a
blessing in disguise!
choice_data_list: It looks like you've moved past that.
It looks like you've moved past that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm not planning on letting things end the
way they began.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You seem to have found your dignity, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's commendable that you've made it this far,
truly. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is a race that I cannot possibly lose.
3000-meters is the distance I excel at most.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to hold back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen... To you, the Classics may not carry
the same importance of the Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But I'm glad that I get to run here with you today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy to be right beside you for this
once-in-a-lifetime race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're quite straightforward, you know that?
But that simplicity may be what's most frightening
about you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's go. Here, under the chrysanthemums, we'll
have our first real contest since that scrimmage!
